member.name: T:Valaiorp.Retry.Policies.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
member.summary: Trips after consecutive failures on the same circuit key (session + tool) and holds the circuit open for . Thread-safe: all state mutations on a are lock-guarded.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Retry.Policies.CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.Reset(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Manually resets the circuit for a given session/tool combination. Useful in tests and admin endpoints.
